testcase.name: Smokevana ERP - Sales Order Automation › Scenario One: Create a new Sales Order
testcase.system-out:
Point 1-3: Launching browser and logging in... Filling username: admin... Filling password... Clicking Sign in... Closed Application Tour modal. Point 4-5: Navigating to Sales Order via Sidebar... Navigated to Sales Order list page. Point 5.5: Clicking Add Sales Order button... Point 6: Waiting for Sales Order creation form to load... Sales Order creation form loaded. Point 7: Opening Customer dropdown... Point 8: Searching for customer 'HarshaVC'... Point 9: Clicking Enable Matrix toggle... Point 10: Searching for product 'THCA'... Point 11: Selecting first product result... Point 12: Filling quantity[0] = 1... Point 13: Filling quantity[1] = 1... Point 14: Filling quantity[2] = 1... Point 15: Clicking Add Matrix button... Point 16: Clicking Save button... Point 17: Clicking Confirm button... Verifying success message... Scenario One: Completed successfully.
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results\NewSalesorder-Smokevana-ER-0d76a-ne-Create-a-new-Sales-Order-chromium\test-finished-1.png]]
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results\NewSalesorder-Smokevana-ER-0d76a-ne-Create-a-new-Sales-Order-chromium\video.webm]]
